title: Austral Gold Starts Near-Mine Silver Exploration in Chile
summary: HIGHLIGHTSAustral Gold has commenced a phased exploration program at its Silver Juncal Project located ~35 km southeast of the 100%-owned Amancaya Mine, near the Guanaco Plant.Phase 1 (March-April 2026): Geological mapping and >1,000 m of channel sampling using diamond-blade rock saw.Phase 2 (Q2 2026): Ground magnetics and induced polarization (IP) surveys to support drill target definition.Phase 3 (Q3 2026): Targeting 10,000 metres of Reverse Circulation (RC) drilling using in-house equipment..
